detectors.description:
ElonPay.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256) (ElonPay.sol#1491-1519) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _safeOwner = recipient (ElonPay.sol#1493)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		ElonPay.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		ElonPay.transfer(address,uint256)
		ElonPay._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)

[ElonPay.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256)](ElonPay.sol#L1491-L1519) has costly operations inside a loop:

	Calls stack containing the loop:
		ElonPay.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		ElonPay.transfer(address,uint256)
		ElonPay._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)
